__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Psychohistory,Treaty of Tordesillas,Divje Babe Flute,Artemisinin,The Calling of Saint Matthew
|rank=orange
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per 3 TECH Relics Awakened, Snail Murky Power +10; TECH Relics Awakened: 180/180
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:Murky Power Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by TECH Relics Awakened]]
